name: ticket-plugin
description: Per-ticket tracking for Linear / JIRA tickets, with deep planning, PR creation, and ship-it commands. Seven slash commands — /ticket-plugin:start, :plan, :update, :pause, :archive, :pr, and :merge — keep a durable per-ticket plan + findings + progress log outside the repo; investigate the codebase and produce a parallelism-aware plan with optional subagent fanout in git worktrees; open a PR with a pre-commit simplify pass and CodeRabbit review polling; and wrap merge-PR + transition-to-Done + archive into one confirmed step.
